---
name: Low Hanging Fruit Issue Template
about: Template for creating low-risk issues for new contributors
---

# Low Hanging Fruit Issue

This issue is limited only to the creator of this issue. This means that only the issue author can attempt to solve this issue. If you would like to work on it, please create another issue with the same contents and refer to issue #743 for more information.

## Files Affected

## Additional Context

---

This issue is for automating the detection and creation of low-hanging fruit issues in the repository. The goal is to recursively find and create GitHub issues for simple tasks that new contributors can work on.
